headline: Monster Beverage Reshapes Leadership To Support Next Phase Of Growth
summary: Monster Beverage announced a series of senior leadership changes across multiple regions. The company named new CEOs for the Americas and EMEA/OSP regions, along with a new Chief Strategy Officer. These appointments are intended to support the company’s growth plans and international focus. For investors tracking Monster Beverage, ticker NasdaqGS:MNST, these leadership shifts come with the stock trading around $81.06. The share price sits against a backdrop of a 46.9% return over the past...
